topic: CMB Axis of Evil - verification of SC pattern (2) gloss + trailing-period removal (queue_id 351)
our_argument_summary: WIN-048 (CMB Axis of Evil) Self-Contradicted under EXP-295. Queue item 351 pushed by decider commit f6bc6e6 (2026-05-14T13:27Z) bundles two follow-on edits from the c7 review: (a) detail_extra trailing-double-period at list item 3 removed (c7 minor hole #0, ISS-2006), and (b) detail_evidence SC pattern (2) inline gloss added (ISS-2007/2009, c7-tracked carry-over). This c8 verifies both edits landed cleanly and that ISS-2008 (moderate MOND-grouping sub_rationale cross-WIN inconsistency) was resolved in the same commit by normalizing all five MOND-grouping WINs (047/048/052/054/055) to the same cosmological-cluster section reference.

dome_code_analysis.calculation_pipeline: No monitor.py domain handles CMB Axis of Evil. Only artifact is a static live-power dashboard tile (Predicted: >2sigma, Observed: 2.5sigma, Tolerance: N/A). No fetch, no comparison. Unchanged from c2-c7.
dome_code_analysis.hardcoded_vs_computed: Display-only static threshold against a known result.
data_sources_used: WMAP / Planck PR3/PR4 CMB temperature maps via published literature - not fetched in code
dome_code_analysis.escape_clauses: None present in monitor.py because the WIN has no monitor.py entry.

code_analysis_tags.monitoring_evidence: Carried forward from c2-c7 with no change - no monitor.py domain, only static dashboard tile (data/wins.json WIN-048.detail_verdict_text still documents this verbatim).
code_analysis_tags.relabels_standard_evidence: Carried forward - dome adopts the anomaly via LambdaCDM-counter-prediction framing without offering a different numerical value; no renamed-mechanism pattern.
code_analysis_tags.post_hoc_evidence: Carried forward - Land & Magueijo 2005 (PRL 95, 071301) and Planck PR3/PR4 maps were public well before any dome monitor commit; detail_verdict_text continues to cite these.
code_analysis_tags.derives_from_dome_evidence: Carried forward - no derivation chain from disc_radius / firmament_height / sun_altitude / moon_altitude to any CMB observable; detail_evidence still explicitly notes no analog in dome geometry.

verification_results.queue_push_reason: WIN-048 double-period removed (detail_extra), SC pattern (2) inline gloss added (detail_evidence). Verification pass to confirm both edits landed cleanly and gloss is accurate.

edit_2_sc_pattern_gloss.target: detail_evidence, first (and only) mention of "SC pattern (2)"
edit_2_sc_pattern_gloss.c7_state: no inline definition: "for SC pattern (2) reasoning - the dome publishes..."
edit_2_sc_pattern_gloss.c8_state: inline parenthetical gloss: "for SC pattern (2) reasoning (self-contradiction via load-bearing-premise logic: treating the dome’s own published physical specification as simultaneously binding and exempt from consistency tests) - the dome publishes..."
edit_2_sc_pattern_gloss.gloss_accuracy: Accurate within scope. The gloss captures the load-bearing-premise logic that drives the WIN-034/WIN-048 contradiction analysis: the dome publishes WIN-034 as a physical specification, invokes it as load-bearing in WIN-029 Schumann conductive-ceiling, and cannot simultaneously hold a CMB-observability premise under WIN-048 without inconsistency. The phrase "simultaneously binding and exempt from consistency tests" is the right diagnosis - the dome treats WIN-034 as a binding physical spec when convenient (Schumann) and as exempt when inconvenient (CMB transparency).

bonus_edit_mond_grouping_sub_rationale.c7_state: WIN-047 cited "Part 6.14", WIN-048/052/054 cited "Part 6.13", WIN-055 had no sub_rationale
bonus_edit_mond_grouping_sub_rationale.c8_state: All five now reference "See cosmological-cluster section (V51.0 Cosmological Expansion overview)" consistently; WIN-055 now has sub_rationale; numeric section refs removed
bonus_edit_mond_grouping_sub_rationale.iss_resolved: ISS-2008 (moderate, the c6 carry-over routed via assigned-analyst)

artifact_scan.note: Scanned claim, finding, detail_evidence, detail_verdict_text, detail_extra, tldr_evidence, tldr_verdict, sub_rationale. No regressions.

cross_win_sc_pattern_check.note: "SC pattern (2)" appears in exactly one location site-wide (WIN-048 detail_evidence). The inline gloss is now the only definition; the numbering "(2)" implies an enumerated taxonomy that does not appear in sections.json. Not blocking - the gloss makes the local meaning clear and the numbering is internal scaffolding - but flagged as a minor residual.

holes_found.description: The phrase "SC pattern (2)" in detail_evidence is the only occurrence of the SC-pattern numbering convention site-wide. sections.json contains no "SC pattern (N)" entries and no taxonomy section enumerates patterns (1), (3), etc. The inline gloss makes the local meaning of pattern (2) self-contained, but the parenthetical "(2)" still implies a numbered taxonomy that the reader cannot resolve. Two acceptable resolutions: (a) drop the "(2)" and refer to "load-bearing-premise SC reasoning" (which the gloss already names verbatim), or (b) defer the numbering until a future EXP catalogues the SC patterns somewhere in Part 5 (Kill Shots) and the "(2)" can be anchored. ISS-2007/2009 were closed correctly on the gloss criterion (which was their literal recommendation); this is a separate residual not raised in those issues. Severity minor.
holes_found.recommendation: Either rename to "load-bearing-premise SC reasoning" (dropping the parenthetical "(2)") or open a separate ISS to catalogue the SC-pattern taxonomy in Part 5. Both are low-priority cosmetic - the load-bearing argument is now legible from the gloss alone. Decider may self-apply option (a) if the rename is trivial, or defer to a future round.

kernel_of_truth.description: The patch sequence (c7 -> c8 -> close ISS-2006/2007/2008/2009) is the multi-agent pipeline working as designed: a verification-class review flags the seam artifacts of an earlier substantive patch, the decider self-applies the minor cleanups in one commit, and the next verification-class review confirms the cleanup landed. The decider chose the surgically minimal patch on both edits: single-byte deletion for the period, one inline parenthetical for the gloss. No prose was re-written, no argument-structure was touched (data/wins.json WIN-048.detail_evidence + .detail_extra diff at f6bc6e6 confirms additive/surgical only).
kernel_of_truth.why_it_doesnt_save_claim: Verification of patch hygiene is not a substantive defense of WIN-048; the three structural failures (false-dilemma framing of LambdaCDM anomalies as dome evidence, eroded Planck reanalysis significance, WIN-034 copper-firmament 160 GHz opacity self-contradiction) all remain intact (data/wins.json WIN-048.detail_evidence paragraphs 1-3, unchanged from c7). The patch addresses cosmetic redundancy and inline definition only - it does not weaken or strengthen the load-bearing argument.

deeper_analysis:
The other side of the argument: a dome defender (or a methodology critic) could call this run pure busy-work. Two consecutive curmudgeon cycles (c7, c8) processing the same WIN for sub-3KB cosmetic patches looks like overhead. The counter is twofold. First, the c7 work was substantive: it confirmed the c6 dup-removal landed, and it surfaced two new minor issues plus correctly externalised the moderate MOND-grouping inconsistency to ISS-2008. Second, c8 closes the loop on c7's findings - without it, ISS-2006/2007/2009 would remain "decider patched, never reverified" and the moderate ISS-2008 fix would be untested across WIN-047/052/054/055. The verification-class flow is explicitly the cheap path: this c8 review used 1 queue slot and verified 4 closed issues across 5 WINs at once. The class-based gate (PROP-025) made this batchable in principle, but item 352 (part2 holistic) is class:holistic and singleton-only, so c8 effectively ran solo and stops here.

Advocate-mode (a dome defender reading WIN-048 today): the load-bearing argument is the WIN-034 160 GHz copper-opacity contradiction. A defender's strongest move is to argue WIN-034 is metaphorical/aspirational rather than a published physical specification. The review now pre-empts that move three ways: (i) the detail_evidence explicitly says "the firmament cannot be metaphorical for one purpose and physical for another" because the dome itself uses WIN-034 as load-bearing in WIN-029 Schumann; (ii) the new SC pattern (2) gloss names the diagnostic - "simultaneously binding and exempt from consistency tests"; (iii) the closing detail_verdict still anchors the post-hoc test for the σ-value claim. A defender who tries the metaphorical retreat now has to fight on three flanks at once. That is a stronger argument structure than at c5, not a weaker one.

Cross-WIN sanity (PROP-022/PROP-025 lens): the MOND-grouping sub_rationale normalization (ISS-2008 fix) is the broader-impact piece of this commit - it touched five WINs, not one. Spot-checked all five: WIN-047/048/052/054/055 now share the same closing reference. No regression. No new artifacts elsewhere.

citation_check.note: All three DOIs verified in cycles c2-c6. c8 is a verification-class re-review of a cosmetic patch event; no new citations introduced, no need to re-verify.

summary_for_decider: Verification pass for queue_id 351 (WIN-048 double-period removed + SC pattern (2) gloss added). BOTH EDITS LANDED CLEANLY. Edit 1: detail_extra trailing-period artifact at list item 3 fully resolved (0 double-period occurrences in any field). Edit 2: SC pattern (2) gloss inserted inline ("self-contradiction via load-bearing-premise logic: treating the dome's own published physical specification as simultaneously binding and exempt from consistency tests") - 170-char additive insertion, gloss is accurate. BONUS: ISS-2008 (moderate MOND-grouping sub_rationale cross-WIN inconsistency) also resolved in the same commit by normalizing WIN-047/048/052/054/055 to a single cosmological-cluster section reference. Verdict Self-Contradicted unchanged; structural pillars (false-dilemma framing, eroded Planck significance, WIN-034 copper-opacity SC) intact. recommended_action: no_change for the WIN. One minor residual flagged: the "(2)" numbering in "SC pattern (2)" implies a taxonomy that does not exist anywhere on the site - either drop the number or catalogue the patterns in a future EXP. Item 352 (part2 holistic) is class:holistic and singleton-only per PROP-025; not batchable with this verification item. 3607 tests pass.
